children.text: that relates to the regulation of a drug that is not subject to the requirements of section 353(b)(1) or 353(f)(1)(A) of this title; and

that is different from or in addition to, or that is otherwise not identical with, a requirement under this chapter, the Poison Prevention Packaging Act of 1970 ( et seq.), or the Fair Packaging and Labeling Act ( et seq.).15 U.S.C. 147115 U.S.C. 1451

children.label: A
children.text: protects an important public interest that would otherwise be unprotected, including the health and safety of children;

children.label: B
children.text: would not cause any drug to be in violation of any applicable requirement or prohibition under Federal law; and

children.label: C
children.text: would not unduly burden interstate commerce.

children.heading: Timely action
children.label: 2 Timely action
children.text: The Secretary shall make a decision on the exemption of a State or political subdivision requirement under paragraph (1) not later than 120 days after receiving the application of the State or political subdivision under paragraph (1).

children.label: A
children.text: any State or political subdivision requirement that relates to the practice of pharmacy; or

children.label: B
children.text: any State or political subdivision requirement that a drug be dispensed only upon the prescription of a practitioner licensed by law to administer such drug.

children.heading: Safety or effectiveness
children.label: 2 Safety or effectiveness
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a), a requirement that relates to the regulation of a drug shall be deemed to include any requirement relating to public information or any other form of public communication relating to a warning of any kind for a drug.

children.label: A
children.text: a regulation or order in effect with respect to the drug pursuant to a statute described in subsection (a)(2); or

children.label: B
children.text: any other requirement in effect with respect to the drug pursuant to an amendment to such a statute made on or after .November 21, 1997

children.heading: State initiatives
children.label: 2 State initiatives
children.text: This section shall not apply to a State requirement adopted by a State public initiative or referendum enacted prior to .September 1, 1997

children.heading: No effect on product liability law
children.label: e No effect on product liability law
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to modify or otherwise affect any action or the liability of any person under the product liability law of any State.

children.heading: State enforcement authority
children.label: f State enforcement authority
children.text: Nothing in this section shall prevent a State or political subdivision thereof from enforcing, under any relevant civil or other enforcement authority, a requirement that is identical to a requirement of this chapter.
